name: @ocom-verification/acceptance-api
description: Cucumber Screenplay acceptance tests for the CellixJS API path

scripts.test:acceptance:coverage: LOG_LEVEL=warn NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' c8 --allowExternal -- cucumber-js --format json:./reports/cucumber-report-api.json
scripts.test:coverage: LOG_LEVEL=warn NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' c8 -- cucumber-js --format json:./reports/cucumber-report-api.json
scripts.clean: rimraf dist reports target coverage coverage-c8 coverage-vitest .c8-output
